global.description: The ad features a bold headline and a clear call to action on an orange background.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to manage their money with clarity and peace of mind.

elements.label: Abstract orange background
elements.description: A smooth, gradient orange background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, white text that reads 'Your money, clearer' prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, outlined in a light color.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline that says 'Built for peace of mind'.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Built for peace of mind

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: A small logo in the top left corner that reads 'VaultRun' in a bold font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center that says 'Start now' in bold white text.

elements.label: User-generated content icon
elements.description: A small circular icon in the top left corner with the text 'UGC' inside.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, key elements include a headline, logo, and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by supporting text, with the logo in the top left and the CTA at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Your money, clearer, Built for peace of mind, VaultRun, Start now, UGC
